form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 342m at Angle Park. Prepared to risk.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last on April 17 over 395m at Murray Bridge behind Giggle Monster beaten 9 lengths (23.22) in a Grade 6. Placed two back at Murray Bridge Straight. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing second (30.96) at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Must be included.

form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 6 on April 9 over 530m at Angle Park behind Compton Rocks beaten 2.25 lengths (30.75). Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 530m at Angle Park by a nose in a Grade 6. Can make it back to back wins.
